name: Crab Cakes
recipeIngredient: 4 slices white bread, crusts removed and barely moistened with water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs and stir in mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, minced parsley, and seafood seasoning.
2. Mix in the bread slices until just combined.
3. Gradually fold in the crab meat until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
4. Shape the mixture into patties.
5. Heat butter in a medium-hot skillet over medium heat.
6. Fry the patties on both sides until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Remove from heat and serve warm.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
